passage_title: GREYING POPULATION STAYS IN THE PINK

sentences.sentence: Elderly people are growing healthier, happier and more independent, say American scientists.
sentences.translation: 美国科学家说，老年人正变得更健康、更快乐，也更独立。

structure.text: are growing healthier, happier and more independent

difficult_points: grow 后接形容词表示逐渐变得，而非单纯的“生长”。
say American scientists 是后置报道语，说明结论来源。

sentences.sentence: The results of a 14-year study to be announced later this month reveal that the diseases associated with old age are afflicting fewer and fewer people and when they do strike, it is much later in life.
sentences.translation: 一项将于本月晚些时候公布的14年研究显示，与老年有关的疾病正困扰越来越少的人；即使发病，时间也会晚得多。

structure.text: to be announced later this month
that the diseases associated with old age are afflicting fewer and fewer people
when they do strike, it is much later in life

difficult_points: to be announced 修饰 study，表示将来被公布的研究。
they 指 diseases，do strike 中 do 用于强调；it 指疾病发作的时间。

sentences.sentence: In the last 14 years, the National Long-term Health Care Survey has gathered data on the health and lifestyles of more than 20,000 men and women over 65.
sentences.translation: 过去14年间，全国长期医疗保健调查收集了两万多名65岁以上男女的健康和生活方式数据。

structure.text: the National Long-term Health Care Survey
data on the health and lifestyles of more than 20,000 men and women over 65

difficult_points: has gathered 与 In the last 14 years 搭配，表示持续到现在的收集。
over 65 修饰 men and women，表示年龄在65岁以上。

sentences.sentence: Researchers, now analysing the results of data gathered in 1994, say arthritis, high blood pressure and circulation problems—the major medical complaints in this age group—are troubling a smaller proportion every year.
sentences.translation: 研究人员目前正在分析1994年收集的数据结果。他们说，关节炎、高血压和循环系统问题——这个年龄组的主要健康困扰——每年影响的人口比例都在缩小。

structure.text: now analysing the results of data gathered in 1994
arthritis, high blood pressure and circulation problems
the major medical complaints in this age group
are troubling a smaller proportion every year

difficult_points: now analysing... 修饰 Researchers；gathered in 1994 修饰 data。
破折号内是三个疾病的同位语说明，主干谓语是 are troubling。

sentences.sentence: And the data confirms that the rate at which these diseases are declining continues to accelerate.
sentences.translation: 而数据证实，这些疾病下降的速度仍在加快。

structure.text: that the rate at which these diseases are declining continues to accelerate
at which these diseases are declining

difficult_points: at which 修饰 rate，表示疾病下降的速度。
continues to accelerate 表示下降速度本身还在加快。

sentences.sentence: Other diseases of old age—dementia, stroke, arteriosclerosis and emphysema—are also troubling fewer and fewer people.
sentences.translation: 其他老年疾病——痴呆、中风、动脉硬化和肺气肿——也正在困扰越来越少的人。
difficult_points: 破折号中的疾病名称是 Other diseases 的同位语举例。
fewer and fewer 修饰可数名词 people，表示数量持续减少。

sentences.sentence: 'It really raises the question of what should be considered normal ageing,' says Kenneth Manton, a demographer from Duke University in North Carolina.
sentences.translation: “这确实提出了一个问题：什么才应被视为正常衰老，”北卡罗来纳州杜克大学的人口统计学家肯尼思·曼顿说。

structure.text: the question of what should be considered normal ageing
what should be considered normal ageing

difficult_points: It 指前文疾病推迟发生的研究结果。
what 从句作 of 的宾语，should be considered 是被动结构。

sentences.sentence: He says the problems doctors accepted as normal in a 65-year-old in 1982 are often not appearing until people are 70 or 75.
sentences.translation: 他说，医生在1982年认为65岁老人出现也属正常的那些问题，如今往往要到人们70岁或75岁才出现。

structure.text: the problems doctors accepted as normal in a 65-year-old in 1982
doctors accepted as normal in a 65-year-old in 1982
are often not appearing until people are 70 or 75

difficult_points: doctors accepted... 修饰 problems，关系代词 that 被省略。
not...until 表示“直到……才”，强调发病年龄推迟。

sentences.sentence: Clearly, certain diseases are beating a retreat in the face of medical advances.
sentences.translation: 显然，某些疾病正在医疗进步面前节节退却。

structure.text: in the face of medical advances

difficult_points: beat a retreat 是比喻性习语，指逐渐退却或减弱。
in the face of 表示面对某种力量或影响。

sentences.sentence: But there may be other contributing factors.
sentences.translation: 但也可能还有其他促成因素。
difficult_points: there may be 是存在句，表示可能存在。
contributing 表示促成某一结果的，而非“有贡献的”字面意思。

sentences.sentence: Improvements in childhood nutrition in the first quarter of the twentieth century, for example, gave today's elderly people a better start in life than their predecessors.
sentences.translation: 例如，20世纪前四分之一时期儿童营养的改善，让今天的老年人比他们的前辈拥有更好的生命起点。

structure.text: Improvements in childhood nutrition in the first quarter of the twentieth century
a better start in life than their predecessors

difficult_points: 长主语的核心是 Improvements，两个 in 短语逐层限定其范围。
give somebody something 是双宾语结构；their predecessors 指上一代人。

sentences.sentence: On the downside, the data also reveals failures in public health that have caused surges in some illnesses.
sentences.translation: 不利的是，数据也揭示了公共卫生方面的失误，这些失误造成了一些疾病的激增。

structure.text: that have caused surges in some illnesses

difficult_points: On the downside 用于转入负面情况。
that 修饰 failures，have caused 表示其造成的后果持续至今。

sentences.sentence: An increase in some cancers and bronchitis may reflect changing smoking habits and poorer air quality, say the researchers.
sentences.translation: 研究人员说，某些癌症和支气管炎的增加可能反映了吸烟习惯的改变以及空气质量的恶化。

structure.text: An increase in some cancers and bronchitis
changing smoking habits and poorer air quality

difficult_points: 主语是 An increase，in... 说明增加的对象。
may reflect 表示推测性的关联，不等于确定因果；say the researchers 后置。

sentences.sentence: 'These may be subtle influences,' says Manton, 'but our subjects have been exposed to worse and worse pollution for over 60 years.
sentences.translation: “这些影响可能很微妙，”曼顿说，“但我们的受试者60多年来一直暴露在越来越严重的污染中。

structure.text: have been exposed to worse and worse pollution

difficult_points: 原文引语跨两句，这一句末尾的引号尚未闭合，仍属同一段话。
have been exposed to 是现在完成时被动，worse and worse 表示污染日益严重。

sentences.sentence: It's not surprising we see some effect.'
sentences.translation: “我们看到一些影响，并不令人意外。”
difficult_points: It's 是 it is 的缩写，it 为形式主语。
we see some effect 是说明 surprising 内容的从句，句尾引号承接前一句。

sentences.sentence: One interesting correlation Manton uncovered is that better-educated people are likely to live longer.
sentences.translation: 曼顿发现的一个有趣相关性是，受教育程度更高的人可能活得更久。

structure.text: that better-educated people are likely to live longer

difficult_points: Manton uncovered 修饰 correlation，关系代词 that 被省略。
that 从句作表语；be likely to 表示很可能。

sentences.sentence: For example, 65-year-old women with fewer than eight years of schooling are expected, on average, to live to 82.
sentences.translation: 例如，受教育不足八年的65岁女性，平均预期能活到82岁。

structure.text: 65-year-old women with fewer than eight years of schooling

difficult_points: 65-year-old 是复合形容词，修饰 women。
are expected to 是被动预测表达，on average 表示平均值而非每个人都如此。

sentences.sentence: Those who continued their education live an extra seven years.
sentences.translation: 继续接受教育的人会多活七年。
difficult_points: Those who... 指“那些……的人”，who 从句限定对象。
an extra seven years 作时长补足成分，表示额外多活七年。

sentences.sentence: Although some of this can be attributed to a higher income, Manton believes it is mainly because educated people seek more medical attention.
sentences.translation: 尽管其中一部分可以归因于更高的收入，曼顿认为主要原因是受过教育的人会寻求更多医疗照顾。

structure.text: Although some of this can be attributed to a higher income
it is mainly because educated people seek more medical attention

difficult_points: Although 引导让步从句，can be attributed to 是被动表达。
it 指教育与寿命的关联；because 从句说明主要原因。

sentences.sentence: The survey also assessed how independent people over 65 were, and again found a striking trend.
sentences.translation: 这项调查还评估了65岁以上人群的独立程度，并再次发现了一个显著趋势。

structure.text: and again found a striking trend

difficult_points: how independent... 是间接疑问从句，作 assessed 的宾语。
assessed 和 found 共用主语 survey，构成并列谓语。

sentences.sentence: Almost 80% of those in the 1994 survey could complete everyday activities ranging from eating and dressing unaided to complex tasks such as cooking and managing their finances.
sentences.translation: 1994年调查中近80%的受访者能够完成日常活动，从独立进食和穿衣，到做饭、管理财务等复杂任务。

structure.text: Almost 80% of those in the 1994 survey
ranging from eating and dressing unaided to complex tasks such as cooking and managing their finances

difficult_points: those in the 1994 survey 指该调查中的人，those 后接介词短语限定。
ranging from...to... 修饰 activities，展示活动难度范围。

sentences.sentence: That represents a significant drop in the number of disabled old people in the population.
sentences.translation: 这意味着人口中失能老年人的数量显著下降。

structure.text: a significant drop in the number of disabled old people in the population

difficult_points: That 指前句近80%老人能够独立完成活动这一结果。
in the number of... 说明下降的具体对象。

sentences.sentence: If the trends apparent in the United States 14 years ago had continued, researchers calculate there would be an additional one million disabled elderly people in today's population.
sentences.translation: 研究人员计算，如果14年前美国已显现的趋势持续下去，如今人口中会额外多出一百万名失能老人。

structure.text: If the trends apparent in the United States 14 years ago had continued
apparent in the United States 14 years ago
there would be an additional one million disabled elderly people in today's population

difficult_points: If 从句用 had continued，主句用 would be，构成对过去未实现情况的假设。
apparent... 修饰 trends；there would be 是存在句。

sentences.sentence: According to Manton, slowing the trend has saved the United States government's Medicare system more than $200 billion, suggesting that the greying of America's population may prove less of a financial burden than expected.
sentences.translation: 曼顿说，放缓这一趋势已为美国政府的医疗保险体系节省了两千多亿美元，这表明美国人口老龄化带来的财政负担可能低于预期。

structure.text: the United States government's Medicare system
suggesting that the greying of America's population may prove less of a financial burden than expected

difficult_points: slowing the trend 是动名词作主语；save somebody money 是双宾语结构。
suggesting 分词短语说明前述数字所暗示的结论，may prove 表示可能最终显示为。

sentences.sentence: The increasing self-reliance of many elderly people is probably linked to a massive increase in the use of simple home medical aids.
sentences.translation: 许多老年人日益增强的自理能力，可能与简单家用医疗辅助器具使用量的大幅增加有关。

structure.text: The increasing self-reliance of many elderly people
a massive increase in the use of simple home medical aids

difficult_points: increasing 修饰 self-reliance，表示自理能力在增强。
be linked to 表示相关联，probably 保留了推测语气。

sentences.sentence: For instance, the use of raised toilet seats has more than doubled since the start of the study, and the use of bath seats has grown by more than 50%.
sentences.translation: 例如，自研究开始以来，加高马桶座的使用量已增加一倍以上，浴椅的使用量也增长了50%以上。

structure.text: the use of raised toilet seats
has more than doubled since the start of the study
and the use of bath seats has grown by more than 50%

difficult_points: has doubled 与 since... 搭配，表示从研究开始持续到现在的变化。
grow by 表示增长幅度；more than 用于两处都表示超过。

sentences.sentence: These developments also bring some health benefits, according to a report from the MacArthur Foundation's research group on successful ageing.
sentences.translation: 麦克阿瑟基金会成功老龄化研究小组的一份报告称，这些发展也带来了一些健康益处。

structure.text: according to a report from the MacArthur Foundation's research group on successful ageing

difficult_points: These developments 指前句所述家用辅助器具的普及。
according to 引出信息来源，on successful ageing 修饰 research group。

sentences.sentence: The group found that those elderly people who were able to retain a sense of independence were more likely to stay healthy in old age.
sentences.translation: 该小组发现，那些能够保持独立感的老年人在晚年更可能保持健康。

structure.text: that those elderly people who were able to retain a sense of independence were more likely to stay healthy in old age
who were able to retain a sense of independence

difficult_points: that 从句是 found 的宾语，who 从句限定 those elderly people。
be able to 表示有能力，be more likely to 表示更可能。

sentences.sentence: Maintaining a level of daily physical activity may help mental functioning, says Carl Cotman, a neuroscientist at the University of California at Irvine.
sentences.translation: 加州大学欧文分校神经科学家卡尔·科特曼说，维持一定程度的日常身体活动可能有助于心理功能。

structure.text: Maintaining a level of daily physical activity
a neuroscientist at the University of California at Irvine

difficult_points: Maintaining... 是动名词短语作主语。
may help 表示可能有助于，而非确定效果；后面的名词短语是 Cotman 的同位语。

sentences.sentence: He found that rats that exercise on a treadmill have raised levels of brain-derived neurotrophic factor coursing through their brains.
sentences.translation: 他发现，在跑步机上运动的老鼠，其大脑中流动的脑源性神经营养因子水平升高。

structure.text: that rats that exercise on a treadmill have raised levels of brain-derived neurotrophic factor coursing through their brains

difficult_points: 第一个 that 引导宾语从句，第二个 that 修饰 rats。
coursing... 修饰 factor，说明这种因子在大脑中流动。

sentences.sentence: Cotman believes this hormone, which keeps neurons functioning, may prevent the brains of active humans from deteriorating.
sentences.translation: 科特曼认为，这种使神经元保持功能的激素，可能防止活跃人群的大脑退化。

structure.text: may prevent the brains of active humans from deteriorating

difficult_points: which 修饰 hormone，keeps neurons functioning 是 keep + 宾语 + 分词结构。
prevent A from doing 表示防止 A 做某事，from 后接动名词。

sentences.sentence: As part of the same study, Teresa Seeman, a social epidemiologist at the University of Southern California in Los Angeles, found a connection between self-esteem and stress in people over 70.
sentences.translation: 作为同一研究的一部分，洛杉矶南加州大学的社会流行病学家特雷莎·西曼发现，70岁以上人群的自尊与压力之间存在关联。

structure.text: As part of the same study
a social epidemiologist at the University of Southern California in Los Angeles
a connection between self-esteem and stress in people over 70

difficult_points: As part of... 表示“作为……的一部分”，交代研究语境。
a social epidemiologist... 是 Teresa Seeman 的同位语，in people over 70 修饰 stress。

sentences.sentence: In laboratory simulations of challenging activities such as driving, those who felt in control of their lives pumped out lower levels of stress hormones such as cortisol.
sentences.translation: 在驾驶等具有挑战性的活动的实验室模拟中，那些觉得能掌控自己生活的人释放出的皮质醇等压力激素水平更低。

structure.text: In laboratory simulations of challenging activities such as driving
who felt in control of their lives
lower levels of stress hormones such as cortisol

difficult_points: those who... 指“那些……的人”，who 从句限定对象。
feel in control of 表示感到能掌控；pump out 此处指大量释放。

sentences.sentence: Chronically high levels of these hormones have been linked to heart disease.
sentences.translation: 这些激素长期处于高水平与心脏病有关。

structure.text: Chronically high levels of these hormones

difficult_points: Chronically 修饰 high，强调高水平长期存在。
have been linked to 是现在完成时被动，表示已发现关联，并非直接断言因果。

sentences.sentence: But independence can have drawbacks.
sentences.translation: 但独立也可能有缺点。
difficult_points: But 转折到独立的负面一面。
can 表示可能性，drawbacks 指缺点或不利后果。

sentences.sentence: Seeman found that elderly people who felt emotionally isolated maintained higher levels of stress hormones even when asleep.
sentences.translation: 西曼发现，感到情感孤立的老年人即使睡着时，也会维持较高水平的压力激素。

structure.text: that elderly people who felt emotionally isolated maintained higher levels of stress hormones even when asleep

difficult_points: who 从句修饰 elderly people，emotionally isolated 表示情感上孤立。
when asleep 是省略从句，完整意思为 when they were asleep。

sentences.sentence: The research suggests that older people fare best when they feel independent but know they can get help when they need it.
sentences.translation: 研究表明，老年人在感到独立、同时知道需要时可以得到帮助的情况下，状态最好。

structure.text: that older people fare best when they feel independent but know they can get help when they need it

difficult_points: fare best 表示“状态最好、表现最好”，不是字面上的车费。
but 并列 feel 和 know；最后一个 it 指 help。

sentences.sentence: 'Like much research into ageing, these results support common sense,' says Seeman.
sentences.translation: “与许多老龄化研究一样，这些结果支持常识，”西曼说。
difficult_points: Like 表示“像……一样”，引出比较对象。
support common sense 指证实常识判断，而不是“支持一个人”。

sentences.sentence: They also show that we may be underestimating the impact of these simple factors.
sentences.translation: 它们还表明，我们可能低估了这些简单因素的影响。

structure.text: that we may be underestimating the impact of these simple factors

difficult_points: They 指 these results。
may be underestimating 是情态动词加进行时，表示可能一直低估。

sentences.sentence: 'The sort of thing that your grandmother always told you turns out to be right on target,' she says.
sentences.translation: “你祖母一直告诉你的那类道理，结果恰恰非常准确，”她说。

structure.text: that your grandmother always told you

difficult_points: that 修饰 thing，关系代词在从句中作 told 的宾语。
turn out to be 表示结果证明是；right on target 是“完全准确”的习语。
